span.p: Section 37: Cooperation by doing one of several acts constituting an offence ...

span.p: An offence is committed by means of several acts

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: The person intentionally cooperates in the commission of that offence

span.p: The person does any one of those acts

span.p: The act is done either singly or jointly with any other person
